name: RPlog_Choices
title: A Choice at the Stranded Camp
summary: Ten days after a raid stranded both Republic and Imperial personnel on a wild world, the two forces coexist uneasily in a shared camp. By a fire, the Twi'lek Lieutenant Wrista, nominally in charge of the New Republic contingent, debriefs a returning Vultan FleetOps scout who reports finding more crash sites but no survivors from the escape pods. The withdrawn, heavily scarred pilot Lance 'Wildman' Corbet offers a theory about decoy pods, then quietly asks to be added to the search rotation now that his wound is mending. Wrista agrees, on strict conditions about his health and the lighter marches, and the group turns to planning the next day's searches while wondering how the Imperials across the camp will handle their own.
